Tokens with the same `oftId` are considered to be equivalent.

Optional. Defined if OFT supported by token

Record_string.string-or-number_.description: Construct a type with a set of properties K of type T

id.description: Owner id=0, Witness id=1, Active id start by 2

EssentialWeb3Transaction.description:
The `EssentialWeb3Transaction` interface provides the minimum set of Web3 Transaction
returned by the SDK. It allows any web3-like provider to be used, as long as it
matches the signature of these essential interface. This prevents
tight coupling to a specific version of the `web3` library.

Uint8Array.description:
A typed array of 8-bit unsigned integer values. The contents are initialized to 0. If the
requested number of bytes could not be allocated an exception is raised.

numReadonlyUnsignedAccounts.description: The last `numReadonlySignedAccounts` of the unsigned keys are read-only accounts

numReadonlySignedAccounts.description: The last `numReadonlySignedAccounts` of the signed keys are read-only accounts

numRequiredSignatures.description:
The number of signatures required for this message to be considered valid. The
signatures must match the first `numRequiredSignatures` of `accountKeys`.

MessageHeader.description: The message header, identifying signed and read-only account

data.description: The program input data encoded as base 58

accounts.description: Ordered indices into the transaction keys array indicating which accounts to pass to the program

programIdIndex.description: Index into the transaction keys array indicating the program account that executes this instruction

CompiledInstruction.description: An instruction to execute by a program

Message.description: List of instructions to be processed atomically

accountKeyIndexes.description: Ordered indices into the transaction keys array indicating which accounts to pass to the program

programIdIndex.description: Index into the transaction keys array indicating the program account that executes this instruction

MessageCompiledInstruction.description: An instruction to execute by a program

MessageAddressTableLookup.description: An address table lookup used to load additional accounts

SignaturePubkeyPair.description: Pair of signature and corresponding public key

isWritable.description: True if the `pubkey` can be loaded as a read-write account.

isSigner.description: True if an instruction requires a transaction signature matching `pubkey`

AccountMeta.description: Account metadata used to define instructions

keys.description:
Public keys to include in this transaction
Boolean represents whether this pubkey needs to sign the transaction

nonce.description: The current blockhash stored in the nonce

NonceInformation.description: Nonce information to be used to build an offline Transaction.

signatures.description:
Signatures for the transaction.  Typically created by invoking the
`sign()` method

recentBlockhash.description: A recent transaction id. Must be populated by the caller

lastValidBlockHeight.description: the last block chain can advance to before tx is declared expired

nonceInfo.description:
Optional Nonce information. If populated, transaction will use a durable
Nonce hash instead of a recentBlockhash. Must be populated by the caller

minNonceContextSlot.description:
If this is a nonce transaction this represents the minimum slot from which
to evaluate if the nonce has advanced when attempting to confirm the
transaction. This protects against a case where the transaction confirmation
logic loads the nonce account from an old slot and assumes the mismatch in
nonce value implies that the nonce has been advanced.

AmountFormatted.description:
Describes the same amount in two variation formats.

For {@link AmountFormat.INT} value contains the amount in the smallest denomination

For {@link AmountFormat.FLOAT} value contains the amount in tokens denomination

estimatedAmount.description: The amount of tokens can be received as a result of transfer considering pending transactions

SwapCalcInfo.description: Response containing the fee and amount adjustments in Token for the bridge transaction.

sourceLiquidityFee.description: Paid for the swap liquidity on the source Chain

sourceSwap.description: Amount adjustment on the swap from the source Token

destinationLiquidityFee.description: Paid for the swap liquidity on the destination Chain

destinationSwap.description: Amount adjustment on the swap to the destination Token

GasFeeOptions.description:
Describes available options of paying the gas fee and the amount to pay when using the corresponding method.

For {@link FeePaymentMethod.WITH_NATIVE_CURRENCY} value contains the amount in the smallest denomination of the source chain currency

For {@link FeePaymentMethod.WITH_STABLECOIN} value contains the amount in the smallest denomination of the source token

ExtraGasMaxLimits.description:
Describes MAX extra gas value can to be passed when using the corresponding method.

For {@link FeePaymentMethod.WITH_NATIVE_CURRENCY} value contains {@link ExtraGasMaxLimit} the amount of the source chain currency

For {@link FeePaymentMethod.WITH_STABLECOIN} value contains {@link ExtraGasMaxLimit} the amount of the source token

ExtraGasMaxLimit.description: Describes the same MAX extra gas amount.

transfer.description: cost of send tx on chain

swap.description: cost of swap tx on chain

gasAmountMax.description: gasAmountMax maximum amount you can receive as extra gas on dest chain

accRewardPerShareP.description: Current accumulated reward per share shifted by P bits
Current accumulated reward per share shifted by P bits

Required_PoolInfo_.description: Make all properties in T required
